caption: A man with short brown hair and a beard, wearing a grey polo shirt, speaks while gesturing with his hands in an indoor room. Behind him, a wooden American flag hangs on the wall to his left, and a black movie poster featuring a silhouette and the text "VERSAL SOLDIER" is positioned to his right. A black speaker is visible in the lower left foreground. As the sequence progresses, the man continues talking, shifting his facial expressions and moving his hands in a conversational manner. His posture remains relatively still while he remains centered in the frame, with the background objects and equipment remaining stationary. The scene maintains consistent lighting and composition throughout the frames, focusing on the man's upper body and head.
